title: Audio Transmitter Receiver TV Computer Speaker Car Adapter 3.5mm Bluetooth 5.0 2-in-1 for Home Sound System/TV/PC/Tablet Headphone General (Black) (Large)
description:
Switch mode:
(1) RX: Receive mode, indicator: blue LED  (2) TX: Transmit mode, indicator light: red LED
RX mode:
Pairing name: KN321, find KN321 in the Bluetooth settings of the phone to pair. The blue light flashes twice a second during the pairing process, and the blue light flashes once every three seconds after the pairing is successful.
how to use:
(1) Plug one end of the audio cable into the audio input of the speaker and the other end into the audio of the KN321.  (2)confirm that it is in RX mode (blue light flash). Find the pairing name in the Bluetooth settings of the phone: KN321 click to pair.
TX mode:
TX mode will automatically search for other Bluetooth receiving devices (such as Bluetooth headset, Bluetooth speaker, Bluetooth receiver, etc.), The red light flashes twice a second during the pairing process, and the red light flashes once every three seconds after the pairing is successful.
How to use:
(1)Plug one end of the audio cable into the audio output of the devices and the other end into the audio of the KN321.  (2)Confirm that it is in TX mode (red light flash). The KN321 will automatically search for Bluetooth headset or Bluetooth speaker pairing.
features: ★[BLUETOOTH TRANSMITTER AND RECEIVER 2IN1] Receiver mode: wirelessly streams audio from your Bluetooth-enabled phone, tablet, or computer to your wired stereo, speakers, or headphones (Only support to be paired with one Bluetooth receiver). Transmitter mode: wirelessly streams audio from your non-Bluetooth TV, home stereo system, or CD player to your Bluetooth headphones or speakers. Switch between transmitter and receiver modes with the simple flick of a switch.
★[NO DRIVER REQUIRED PLUG READY TO USE] No need to download driver, plug and play TV computer or Bluetooth speaker headset.

★[PORTABLE AUDIO-STREAMING POWER] Bluetooth Adapter has got powerful wireless audio streaming capabilities. It features Bluetooth 5.0 chip to ensure high fidelity transmission of Bluetooth audio signal for music streaming to those speakers or home stereo systems that doesn’t have the capability.Slip it into your backpack or laptop bag and take it on-the-go without the slightest effort.

★[WIDE APPLICATION] With the included 3.5mm cable and 3.5mm to 2RCA cable, this Receiver Transmitter adapter can widely be used on your computer, laptop, home stereo system, headphone, smartphone, Mp3 player, CD player, Cars with AUX-in and 3.5mm connector/ Computer Speakers/ Odinary Speakers/ Subwoofers/ Radios/ Multimedia Speakers/ Power Amplifiers/ Echo Walls, etc.

★[QUALITY ASSURANCE AND SERVICE] Provides a 60-day return and 12-month replacement warranty, as well as lifetime accessible technical support. Please contact us if you have any questions. Reply to your message within 12 hours.

reviews.title: Great quality device if you're on a budget
reviews.text: [[VIDEOID:e49e95641bb1dc426258e889516d11e0]] Over great product for the price. I can't complain. If you've got the money and would like to go for a more "high end" product there are plenty of options available. However, this one appeals greater to the general public. Most reviews say the same thing: It cuts out if too far away and it has a short battery life. Also if it is being used while charging you'll heard a little buzzing noise. You get what you pay for. It does its job and I can't complain  for the price.

reviews.title: For A/V wireless solution, it is workable but not perfect.
reviews.text:
First, my purpose is to stream audio to wired QC headphones from my AV receiver, as a replacement for my broken analog FM TV sound transmitter/phones. For THIS purpose... I bought a pair of these BT devices, and it works, but the sync between audio and video is - versus analog - perceptible. The streaming generation is less sensitive to this, but AV-philes find it annoying.

It is a problem in all BT, compressed audio, technologies - to some degree. Compressed audio requires buffering, buffering introduces some minimum delay, and the delay can be worse depending upon the nature of the audio.
For many programs (sports, etc) sync isn't a problem, but in close-up talky-talky scenes the audio lag is annoying vs. the FM phones, which have imperceptible lag. For NON-SYNCed applications - this is a non-issue.
I wish Roku had a AV sync setting (+/- ms). This is what BT 5.0 does - it delays the video based on the estimated audio lag. *But that doesn't help here because these devices do NOT control the video stream*.

Otherwise, audio quality of BT vs FM is equivalent. My FM phones were very good (AR, $150) and audio was excellent, so the BT pair has good sound in this application. I have not noted any static others reported, except for a slight hum when the RX is not connected. Generally, the BT audio is equivalent to any other BT audio connection (ie., streaming iPhone to car stereo, etc.).
8/18/2020 Revision: After a power outage, I noticed a VERY bad hum. Removed RX side's power, no change. Removed TX sides power (from USB outlet on cable box), NO HUM. I tried several other USB outlets, each had some hum though with different qualities. Finally, I got out a good high amp USB hub & used it to power the TX side - no hum at all. SO... the transmitting side is VERY sensitive to ripple in its USB power circuitry.

One VERY annoying thing - my devices both power off after 4hrs (6hrs?) regardless of input, even though both TX/RX devices are permanently wired to USB power. It ought to power down only if on battery or unconnected for some time (firmware update perhaps?). Other than this obvious design choice, I have had no connection issues - power on TX, then RX, connects reliably in ~10s. Once connected stays reliably connected UNTIL it powers down.

So the good: Cheap solution to use superior wired headphones. Small & USB powered, so hides away easily on both TX and RX sides. Cheaper & more versatile than quality FM TV transmitter/phone combos.

And the bad: Audio LAGS behind video noticeably, 50-150ms. Also, I haven't tried with multiple BT sources - but there is no UI, no way to select a specific source - I suspect this would be a problem for some.

Overall: For the price, I can't complain and wouldn't spend 5x for good FM TV audio phones.

reviews.title: Compatible With All Devices
reviews.text: Amazing product! I like the easy connectivity and sound quality is top of the line. I wish had known about this product before. It is compatible with all of my devices. Even my older television! Five stars all the way!

reviews.title: Nope. Didn't work with TV..
reviews.text: I bought this to try to move the sound FROM my Panasonic, non-bluetooth television TO my bluetooth headphones or a bluetooth speaker. Tried both, neither worked - was a complete waste of time. Now, who's going to refund me for the printer ink to print a label to return it?

reviews.title: Works like a charm
reviews.text: Fantastic. Works right out of the box. I set it up with an aux to an older stereo and it connected right away. I'm probably going to buy another one for the office.

title: FiiO Q5S High Resolution DAC and Headphone Amplifier
features: FiiO Q5S high resolution DAC and headphone amplifier

reviews.title: The little DAC with big magic
reviews.text:
This gadget is simply ahead of its time. For audio enthusiasts (like me) who dare to explore how the right DAC can elevate the experience of music listening to a delightful level, this DAC won't disappoint. It brings out the best in headphones (reasonably decent ones), which in my case were a Sennheiser HD 600 and a budget triple-driver IEM. Also, it breathed life into the premium speakers of my old car--simply unbelievable; I never heard them sound so good (the DAC's line-out was fed into the car's aux-in). My tracks came from Amazon HD Music.

As a gadget aficionado in general, I find this DAC well-designed, functionality- and aesthetics-wise, and with a solid build and classy finishing that clearly distinguish it from the other DACs in this price range. It's one of the best gadgets I bought during recent years.

reviews.title: No quality control.
reviews.text: Ordered a “like new” used item. Description said it had a 4.4mm headphone jack.  The box was a relatively new, but item inside was nothing like described.

reviews.title: Much better than expected...Updated!!! MQA use...
reviews.text:
02/16/21
I've been using the Q5s TC for some weeks now mainly with Apple Music and sometimes the SIRIUSXM app for iOS on my iPhone 12 Pro. Just a days ago I decided to check out MQA music on TIDAL. I have multiple headphones and settled on Shure SRH1540 and SRH1840. I have listed a number of headphones in other reviews so I won't go there. Anyway, WOW!!!, what a revelation. Listening to MQA's through TIDAL is very revealing and at one point on some recordings I had to say to myself, "there were anymore detail and layering I would be able to taste and smell it". I can also easily hear what I can assume is in some cases budgets, engineering and anything else that might affect the way a recording sounds.

Now from my understanding the Q5s does not unpack the MQA music file but it appears. it's definitely seeing and recognizing the file, if not totally able to unpack it. I say this because the indicator on the front glows a solid yellow which according to FiiO is AptX HD, don't know but it makes a difference. Talking about spacial clues? all over the place. But of course it depends on the recording. I can say this, listening to all my old new music, from Aretha to Soundgarden and more is so much fun and enjoyable.

I'm a ex-audiophile that actually love music more than the equipment (most of the time). The Apple AirPods Max reviews and rages made me revisit headphone collection. After selling 3 and decommissioning 1 I ended up with my mostly hated (not by me, I love the way sound) Sennheiser HD700. Measurements and other people's bias' aside I decided to put a dac/amp in my setup for my iPhone 12 Pro. The Q5s plugs right into my iPhone via the supplied connector with no issues at all. The bluetooth works great as well. I prefer direct connection over using BT mainly because I want to as close to the true signal as possible. AAC sounds great through this dac/amp combo. I can't hear a real difference the 2. The Q5s is a solid and professional quality dac/amp combo. It does get a little warm while running but nothing that concerns me. I'm also using the Shanling UP4 which is to my ears good too and serves another purpose in modest collection. The Shanling is not capable of plugging directly into the iPhone but does a really decent job with BT. I prefer the direct connection ability of the Q5s. Of course like I mention the build quality is in a different league as it should be due to the price difference between the 2.

reviews.title: Ain’t loud enough...
reviews.text: It sounded low volume, muffled & cluttered to me. Didn’t sound like an *amp* with dual chips. BT wasn’t strong enough either.

reviews.title: They fixed all of my complaints with the Q5
reviews.text:
1) One USB port
2) Volume knob is also the power-on, as found on the Q1
3) Nice input selector on the right with some labeled LEDs that also show battery charging level
4) Fewer buttons
5) Bluetooth 5.0 can do 24-bit/96khz, so need cable only for charging once Apple supports aptX HD (audiophile-only issue)

Before going any further, I upgraded the firmware from 0.04 to the latest (0.39). The frequency response with 0.39 seems a lot smoother.

The Q5s sounds different from Q5. It's a clearer, more detailed sound. I also like that the bass level is a little higher with the OFF setting. I use ATH-M50x headphones.

So, FiiO, if you are listening, here are my new suggestions:

a) Replace the microUSB port with USB-C. It's a much more reliable connection. microUSB gets loose over time.
b) Have a bass switch or knob that allows for more bass settings. Actually, the EQ feature on the FiiO app is probably a better way to go, assuming it is remembered when not using the app. I have not tried it yet. If that's the case, why not get rid of the base boost button altogether?
c) Have different sleep timeouts for charging vs. not charging. Add 1 hour, 2 hour, and Never as possibilities to each.

Non-FiiO problem: macOS and iOS do not support Bluetooth aptX HD or LDAC, so I will need to wait for 24-bit/96khz over BT 5.0. I submitted a bug to Apple. I hope others will do the same.

reviews.title: Great for outside work
reviews.text:
Was wearing these when taking down Christmas decorations and listening to an audio book.

My neighbor thought it was ignoring him but I just didn’t hear him - these have good noise cancellation. Sound quality was great too.

reviews.title: Solid Value
reviews.text: Regular ear buds don't fit in my ears so I need the "wings." I am very happy with how they perform but they are not as "full range" as more expensive brands.

reviews.title: Good customer service
reviews.text: I had some issues with my first set and the customer service was awesome. I appreciate a company that will backup their products.

reviews.title: Love these
reviews.text: These are comfortable and easy to use. Good sound as well.

reviews.title: Good sound quality
reviews.text:
These are good quality but my left ear is uncomfortable. My ear must be a different shape. I was hoping the battery life would be better, but its ok. I use it to listen to books while i work. Take calls when needed.
Most bluetooth headsets have a delay or echo. These do not. It makes phone calls very clear.
These are the best sound quality of all but my Dewalt headsets.
The battery lasts about 5 to 6 hours with my streaming usage. Probably last much longer with just calls.
My left ear hurts after a couple hours, but ny right ear is fine for all day.
They charge quickly about an hour maybe a little more.
DON'T MISPLACE THE CHARGING CASE they will become worthless. They can't be charged without it.
And it seems if they power off by themselves they have to be reset in the case.
All that being said i probably would buy them again.

reviews.title: Big Lag
reviews.text: I use this headset for working from home, and every phone call is a struggle due to lag. I am constantly talking over people or being talked over by them. It's functional, but not ideal perhaps for phone calls.

reviews.title: Big Upgrade for me!!
reviews.text: These are fantastic!  I had a pair that pooped out in less than a year, I got these with my fingers crossed and so far they are a BIG UPGRADE!!! Voice clarity & noise canceling are great!  I work from home with 2 big dogs, it matters for me.

reviews.title: Very happy
reviews.text: I really like this headset.  I love the charging station as I often woukd forget to charge my last headset that was charged with usb cable.  My only issue with the headset is that the headband is not adjustable and I have a smaller head so the support bar sits a little low.  Very good connection and stays connected if I move around the house.

reviews.title: It Won't Charge
reviews.text: It worked wonderfully for a couple months and now it won't charge. I have switched outlets thinking it was my outlet. I also make sureits lined up in charging base. I loved it until it stopped working. Its a little pricey to only get 2 month use.

reviews.title: Comfortable for truckers and the office.
reviews.text:
I am a dispatcher and I have to wear a headset 8hrs a day. I can stand this one for about 6 hrs. before I need to switch ears. That is better than most headsets I have used. My office orders $300 headsets and this one can throw down with the best of them. The noise cancelation is excellent and the calls sound loud and clear. The Bluetooth connection last the entire 8+ hour shift. Once paired it connects seamlessly when I set up for my day.

Before you spend hundreds of dollars on a headset, give this one a chance. I am glad I did.

I hope this helps. :-)

reviews.title: Not a quality product
reviews.text: I needed these to fit my Sony earbuds which are always smaller than normal earbuds. I've used Comply in the past and loved them but they're expensive. Should have bought them anyway. These are small plastic tubes inserted into blue memory foam. The tubes don't stretch to wrap around the tip of the earbud the way quality products do and the tubes are apparently not glued to the memory foam as they separate when you're trying to install them.

reviews.text: Really like these foam tips. They hold extremely well in my ears whether I'm hitting hitting the punching bag, jogging or cutting grass.

With that, after just a couple days, the outer section broke away from the inner so they no longer fit on the ear bud. I do not recommend purchasing.

reviews.title: Quality case, needs key ring hook or lanyard
reviews.text: This case looks great.  The air pod pro case fits perfectly, and does not slide out.  The top cap piece adheres fine, all without adhesive.  I really wish it were designed to allow a key ring or some sort of lanyard to attach to my keys.  I carry the case in pocket and always fear it falling out.

reviews.title: Outstanding value!
reviews.text: Highly recommended for anyone needing an Air Pod Pro cover!

reviews.title: Fantastic Quality And Presentation!
reviews.text:
MONOCARBON came in hot with this lite weight protective carbon fiber shell. When opening the box I was kind of surprised the presentation looked really nice. In the box was included ( Carbon Fiber Shell, Lanyard, Cards with info on it, even included a little piece of carbon fiber to keep)

The shell weight is about 8 grams, and is 0.6mm thick. The hole cutouts are precise. Seems very durable and looks like it would withstand some drops and help protect from scratches when it's inside your pocket. The include lanyard is a nice touch and it makes use with the built in lanyard spot in the AirPods itself.

I overall would recommend this product for your EDC especially if you like carbon fiber and light weight / non bulky cases.

reviews.title: A very minimal sleek case for the airPods Pro 2
reviews.text:
I have purchased this brand before for my apple watch series 6 titanium, Ive only had the shell for two days before it decided to walk away, or fell off and went byby. There was no adhesion to the watch and little effort will cause it to come off. Thank you guys for your concern about what we think about your product. Great customer service!

With that said, This case is no different with the top half, it will slip off with out you knowing.

They have no adhesive strips like others will include. I guess they have to high of confidence in their product. Nice as it is, I would expect more.

I have purchase thin strip double sided adhesive through amazon to have around when needed. This was no exception.

Now that I had to vent my concern with their product, I was prepared with handling this concern.

The bottom shell is no problem since the opening for the lanyard will secure the bottom shell, I have added a small strip of double sided adhesive to the sides of the top half shell.

These are the most minimal light weight hardshell cases you can buy, the look great and feel’s great and will take any reasonable
punishment you can give it and
protect what is important.

The packaging is nice, too nice, they could have spent less on the box and a little more on protecting the investment, like adhesive. They do have decals in a strip, if this was to prevent cases from slipping off, you could have fooled me. There was no instructions in the box on anything, 🤔.

Don’t let my concern detour you from making the investment.

reviews.title: saved my husband’s life!
reviews.text: ...because it covered the sound of his snoring and I no longer am tempted to smother him with a pillow! They are very comfortable even though I’m very sensitive to irritable feelings. I’m a light sleeper and it blocked out all the little lights that keep me awake. It stayed charged all night. I’m ordering another for day time use! I’ll probably give  them to every one I know for Christmas. Seriously amazing!

reviews.title: Adequate sound quality but difficult controls.
reviews.text: I use the sleep headphones because I listen to books to get to sleep. I need the volume quite high because I use hearing aids. This headset is adequate for my purpose. It’s very comfortable to wear, but the controls are not very sensitive.

reviews.title: Works well for sleeping
reviews.text:
I wanted some headphones that were flat and wouldn't hurt my ears or fall out and get lost while I was trying to go to sleep. These work just fine. The speakers lie flatly against my head and don't poke or feel lumpy. I only use them for sleeping, though, not for exercising, so I can't say how easy or difficult it would be to remove the speakers and controller to wash the headband part.

Sound is fine. They don't go into your ear like regular earbuds, so you have to turn the volume up a little, but it does what it should. I haven't tried to control the volume using the buttons on the headband so I can't really rate that aspect. All in all, it does what I wanted it to.

reviews.title: Not comfortable
reviews.text: This thing works well, but it’s not comfortable for laying down. I was hoping to wear it at night while falling asleep but there is no way to get comfortable with it on due to the small speakers inside. I’m not sure how it would work with exercise either because it’s pretty loose and I’d be worried to get sweat on it.

reviews.title: Headband, controls, sound quality, charge stats--all exactly what I wanted
reviews.text:
This resolved so many issues with other options. The headband is so very comfortable--wish I could buy 5 headbands without speakers just for the comfort for everyday wear. What I really wanted was comfortable speakers for podcasts as I go to sleep or do tasks or just enjoy! These fit the bill. Volume is perfect. Bluetooth connection is quick and stable. I can do 2 nights before charging again. The buttons work well with podcasts, moving to next or previous episodes. I just ordered a second one.

Thank you and if there is a way to get just the headband, please let me know.

title: Skullcandy Grind True Wireless In-Ear Bluetooth Earbuds Compatible with iPhone and Android / Charging Case and Microphone / Great for Gym, Sports, and Gaming, IP55 Water Dust Resistant - Grey/Blue
description: Meet the aptly named true wireless earbud for every part of your daily grind. Say hello to Grind™. Thanks to premium sound, hands-free voice control and a water/sweat-resistant build, these are truly your everyday, do-it-all earbuds. Features Skull-iQ Smart Voice Control technology to control audio, calls, Spotify Tap, and many other features hands-free (Compatible with smartphone devices on Android 10 or newer, and iOS 12 or newer)
features: Note : If the size of the earbud tips does not match the size of your ear canals or the headset is not worn properly in your ears, you may not obtain the correct sound qualities or call performance. Change the earbud tips to ones that fit more snugly in your ear

Supreme Sound - Relax, workout or run listening to your favorite tunes with crystal clear audio, gnarly bass and you'll be listening for up to 40 hours on a single charge. The case holds 31 hours, the buds hold 9 hours of battery
Skull-iQ Technology - Share your tunes with a friend in real time, activate your assistant, customize your earbud controls and trigger your phone camera to take the perfect selfie

Skull-iQ also offers complete hands free, meaning you never need to take off your gloves or let go of the handlebar. Play, pause, adjust volume, take calls, skip tracks, launch Spotify and activate Stay-Aware Mode, all without ever touching your device
Never lost with Tile - With Tile technology, Skullcandy tech makes it super easy to track down either earbud and keep your gadgets safe! Download the Tile app and follow the instructions to activate
Buy With Confidence - 1 Year warranty included with the Grind Fuel, whether you're an adult or child be sure to wear your earbuds in full confidence

reviews.title: Refurb- came coated with previous owner's ear wax - Yuck !  UPDATE !
reviews.text:
non hygenic refurb process disappoints- didn't try the super gross earbuds

UPDATE - I spent the extra $20 for a new set. these have issues. the earbuds turn on by themselves in the case and:
1.) hijack the phone connection
2.) use up all the battery, then charge up, and then run down the battery...so when you go to use the earbuds, the batteries are drained in earbuds and the case

other reviewers write of similar problem

skullcandy chat says they think the case needs to be replaced- I can send them in and wait a few weeks for their warranty repair. but it appears these issues are in the design

or return to amazon within the return period.

yes, that.

reviews.title: Nice sound
reviews.text: These have become my favorite earbuds love the voice activated commands

reviews.title: Stopped Charging
reviews.text: Stopped charging after a month. Return window just expired a few days ago. Now I have to deal with returning through Skullcandy

reviews.title: Comfort!
reviews.text: So the sound quality is good, battery life is good but for me the most important point is they are comfortable. I've been through a LOT of ear buds in search of something that I can wear for several hours without my ears starting to hurt and these are them! Charging case doesn't feel very substantial, but since I don't need to charge them every couple of hours I can live with it.

reviews.title: Interesting app
reviews.text: I've been using these earbuds for several weeks now, and they're as good as any pair I have. And I have several. They connect without issue and have good, clear sound. If you're looking for the intricasies of fine tuning, how good is the base and all that, I'm not the gal for you. However, I think music sounds great, and they're perfect for listening to YouTube vids on my computer and audio books on my phone. The app is interesting. At first I thought I could talk directly to my buds. "Hey, Skullcandy!" (First earbuds I've had with voice control.) But you have to use the app for that feature. Not quite as convenient in my opinion, although perhaps I was expecting too much. The controls are not touch, but require clicking on the individual buds to control them. You can also control them through the app, though. Instructions are clear and easy to understand. I was up and running in minutes. All in all, I think they are excellent and definitely worth the price tag.

reviews.title: Nice little bud case
reviews.text: I could imagine a few other ways to utilize this little zippered case, designed for earbuds. But, it works very well for it's intended purpose. Even for some styles that have the 'wrap around' type support, as shown in my pics. It was a little snug, but they fit. The standard buds (either wired or wireless) fit much better. The case itself is nice 'pleather', good zipper and nicely appointed swivel snap to attach it to whatever you want to hang it on. My wife chose the natural leather color to go with one particular purse. She hangs it on the outside of the purse, like a 'bling' effect. Looks great. Good purchase. Five stars.

reviews.title: Just what the doctor ordered
reviews.text: I was looking for a case that would hold my slightly over-sized earbuds without it being too large or too bulky. These fit perfectly in my briefcase and there is plenty of room for my over-sized buds. It's a really  attractive case  for the money. I'm not sure if that is real leather, but who cares as long as they protect  what's inside. The added hook comes in handy since I can attach it to a loop in my briefcase so that it doesn't sink to the bottom and I have to dig for it.

reviews.title: Well made
reviews.text: Very well made.  Anticipate it lasting a very long time.  plenty of room. Use it to hold my headset for cellphone.  Very pleased with product.

reviews.title: They constantly fail
reviews.text:
The sound is good but they constantly fail to connect with my windows 10 laptop. When they do connect, it is usually just one of the earbuds and then it disconnects a short time later. I guess the battery life is okay but I've never been able to run them down as I get so frustrated with the connectivity issues.
The final straw was when I took them out for a jog for the fist time. One earbud failed and now will not power on. Is it due to moisture? I'll never know & I don't care. These are going in the trash.

They are fairly easy to connect to bluetooth devices. The case seems to hold a lot of battery and lasts a long time and I like that it charges with USB-C. The ear fins on the earbuds make it very snug and a good fit in my ears, and this also makes it noise cancelling. The case is a nice small size too. I've used it for almost a month and I have no complaints about them :)

title: SIMOLIO Wireless Headphones for TV Watching with Transmitter/Charging Dock 2 in 1, 2.4G Wireless Earbuds for TV Listening, Dialog Mode & Boosted Vol & Spare Battery for Seniors, by-Pass, 100ft Range
features: WIRELESS EARPHONES FOR TV FOR HARD OF HEARING W/ TV AUDIO LISTENING ASSISTANCE - Voice clarity and noise reduction tech reduces distracting background noises and makes you hear each word spoken on your favorite show with full intelligibility. Automatic signal control tech stabilizes sudden increases in TV volume to prevent damage to your hearing. Supports optical, RCA and 3.5 mm audio outputs on most TVs. Not recommended for pacemaker carriers.

ADVANCED 2.4GHZ AUTO FHSS TECH, NO PAIRING OR DELAY, 100FT LONG TRANSMISSION - Operating on the 2.4GHz radio frequency, this tv wireless earphone has superior sound reproduction and a powerful signal that can pass through ceilings or walls. No pairing required, no lip-sync delay, no need to be facing a certain angle or position, and no interference when someone passes by.

PROFESSIONAL WIRELESS TV HEADPHONE, CUSTOMIZE THE TV SOUND TO BEST FIT YOU - people with different sound frequency sensitivities can select TONE (treble/normal/bass) to find the best parameters and hear the target source clearly. The BALANCE control is specifically designed for people with different hearing levels in the left and right ears. You can select STEREO on the transmitter to enjoy Hi-fi music or MONO to enjoy clearer TV conversations.

UNIQUE 3 IN 1 DESIGN TV HEADPHONES FOR FULL CONVENIENCE, ERGONOMIC NECKBAND & SOFT EARBUDS & SPARE BATTERY FOR LASTING TV ENJOYMENT - Transmitter, charging base and headset stand 3-in-1 design for your full convenience. The built-in rechargeable and replaceable Li-battery supports 7 hours playtime. A spare battery is always in the base charged & ready for lasting TV enjoyment. The ergonomic neckband design and ultra-soft ear tips bring you an easy and comfortable TV viewing experience.

WIRELESS EARBUDS FOR TV WITH INNOVATIVE “BY-PASS” FEATURE SUPPORTS SIMULTANEOUS AUDIO TRANSMISSION TO WIRELESS HEADPHONE AND WIRED TV SOUBNDBAR - If you only have one TV audio output and it is currently occupied by your soundbar or AV receiver, the by-pass feature can help you, and it’s the best solution for families watching TV together.

reviews.title: Unusably uncomfortable
reviews.text:
Feels premium in the hand.
Sound amazing for in-ear headphones at this price point.
Gets unbearably uncomfortable after 10 minutes in my ears. I have normal sized ears, but the shoulder of even the smallest the ear hooks dig in and hurt terribly really quickly. Super disappointing, as the sound quality is really good for the price. Returning and continuing to use my $17 Anker buds that are as comfortable as can be (though, admittedly they have anemic bass)

reviews.title: High quality ear buds
reviews.text:
These work great on my iPhone but do not connect to my laptop. I tried everything and they won’t work on my laptop at all. They connected in seconds to my iPhone though.

The sound quality is crisp and clear. The battery life has been great and I’m overall happy with my purchase.

reviews.text: Are use this for the gym they’re pretty comfortable and they kind of stay in my ears were none of the others do. I must have small inner ears ,but the sound is fine I haven’t spoken to anybody on the phone yet to hear if I sound clear, but as far as the music goes it does the job!

reviews.title: Fantastic headphones
reviews.text: I’m just now ordering my second pair. Original pair still work, but the cord is finally stiff and cracking after thousands of miles cycling, hiking, and hundreds of hours in the gym. I see a lot of people complaining about the mic, I don’t think I’ve ever used that function so I can’t speak to that.  However, the sound quality is better than my iPod Pros, and they still sound great at 25mph on the bike, I’ve never once had an issue with wind noise or of them falling out.  Great value for the money.

reviews.title: Just pull the trigger you will thank me later
reviews.text:
Wow! I own hifiman arya headphones attached to topping d90 DAC & a90 amp.
I replace the default cable with this in the sound Improvement is incredible! It may have to do with the fact that it is an XLR connection as opposed to the quarter inch connection....

Nonetheless this has made these headphones sound even more incredible

reviews.title: Sounds, looks & feels very nice
reviews.text: It's just what you'd hope, might look a little better in person. Sound is excellent. Connections are just right.

reviews.title: Sweeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeet!
reviews.text:
These headphone cables just flat out look sweeeet! I bought them for their looks alone and to be honest, they do NOT make any sonic difference in my music and they should NOT! That sort of drivel is the rote of the dreaded frAudiophile. I listen to music, not equipment. But I do look at my equipment and these cables look great!

Buy them if you want to class up your 'phones. I did!

Trust me. I know what I'm doin' when I'm reviewin'.

title: ULAK Compatible with Airpods Pro Case, Designed Protective Cover Soft TPU Transparent Shockproof Case Accessories with Keychain for Airpods Pro 1st Generation 2019 [Front Led Visible], PinkGlitter
features: Clear case is designed compatible with AirPods Pro (2019 Release), NOT fit the other Version; easy access to your AirPods Pro and the pairing button, with effortless insertion and removal of the protective case. The front LED indicator is visible while wire and wireless charging
Crystal Clear & Lightweight - clear case is made of Eco-friendly anti-yellow high quality TPU, transparnet appearance shows off the original beauty of your elegant Airpod Pro
Supreme Drop Protection- Made with Soft TPU, AirPods Pro Cases highly protect your AirPods case from bumps, drops, scratches and dust without adding additional bulk

Carabiner/Keychain Attached - includes a portable high quality durable keyring,you can easily hang it on a backpack, keychain, belt of trousers, etc., in case of missing it and is being very convenient to use.

The separate design of the top and bottom case ensures easy installation of the air Pods Pro case.Warm Notes - Includes 1 x Case compatiblw with AirPod Pro (2019) , 1 x Carabiner keyring (DOES NOT INCLUDE AIRPODS)

title: Beats Fit Pro Case Cover, AIRSPO Soft Silicone Case for Beats Fit Pro 2021 Shockproof Beats Fit Pro Earbuds Case Cover with Keychain （Earth）
features: 【Compatibility】This Shock-Absorbing protective case is specially designed for Beats Fit Pro charging case (2021) (Notice: The Beats Fit Pro is not included)

【High Quality Material】The Beats Fit Pro case cover made of soft durable elastic silicone material, complete protection against scratches, bumps, anti-shock and anti-slip, the surface is treated with special oil spray for anti-fingerprint and dustproof

Durable Carabiner】Each silicone beats fit pro protective case is equipped with a metal carabiner clip, you can easily hang it on a backpack, keychain, belt of trousers, etc., in case of missing it and is being very convenient to use

【Easy Installation】Come with highly sticky doulble-sided adhesive design avoid losing your beats fit pro earbuds when you out the door,support wireless charging and charging with charging cable no need to remove the case cover to charge your beats fit pro

【4 in 1 Package】One Silicone Case, One Carabiner, One Steel Ring, Two Spare Gel Pad. (beats fit pro & charging case not included) 30-Day money-back for any reason. If there are problems, Contact us anytime

reviews.title: Awesome case
reviews.text: I love this case for my Beats Fit Pros.  The regular case is way too slippery, especially with dry hands.  This has a nice rubbery grip, plus the carabiner.

reviews.title: Great quality
reviews.text: [[VIDEOID:ad92bf895df61c4b1443a717fa59a9c7]] Great product but I ended up choosing the hard case instead bc I read it protects more. I also read some reviews that it does not fit, but mine fit just perfect.

reviews.title: Fits my headphones
reviews.text: I was worried this wouldn’t fit my headphones correctly but it does. I bought it so I could hang these in my backpack and find them easy.

title: Skullcandy Riff Wired On-Ear Headphones - White/Crimson
description: Lightweight, stylish headphones with a virtually indestructible headband. Riff let's you manage calls and tracks with buttons on the ear cups and even folds up when you're packing it on the go. It's everything you need and nothing you don't.
features: Refined acoustics
Collapsible, flat-folding design
Ultra-durable headband
Lightweight and comfortable
Microphone with call and track control

reviews.title: Possibly not authentic or just GARBAGE quality
reviews.text: It snapped! Look at the photo I posted. These headphones are complete trash and were a waste of my time and money!!

reviews.title: Ok
reviews.text: Ok

reviews.title: Worth the buy.
reviews.text: I love skull candy products. Got these for my son. He loved them, great sound quality, noise canceling and comfortable. Good sound quality for calls and mic ect.

reviews.title: Band snapped in half when the cord got caught on something...
reviews.text: Seems like good quality, however band is kind of flimsy. Cord got caught on something and with a small tug it snapped the head band in half, so had to throw them away. :(

reviews.title: Great
reviews.text: Great value and the quality is good. Skullcandy has been a reliable brand for my family for over 10 years.
